Dialog.name: MND_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked[n]me to get a specific item for her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}That's... the ornament at the top of the tree, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}Why do you need one of those...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}...Oh. If I'm right, it might not refer to an ornament at all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's a type of plant that's sometimes called the "Christmas Star."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Could you wait a few minutes? I'll go double-check.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5053 0 0}Sorry for the wait! Here you go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I think what you're looking for is a poinsettia.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}This flower is usually sold during Christmastime, so it'd be hard to find in stores now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Fortunately, I had some in my room. Here you go.[n]{f 1 1}
